title: Fullstack web
parts: I've made my fair share of fullstack websitesv and SPA's.
From backend to frontend, going by the database and finishing with the deployment, making a website has no secrets for me.
My prominent skills are Springboot and React.

title: Mobile dev
parts: I also tried some mobile development.
I worked on a production ready app during my internship at MyGamePlan and made a Animal Crossing Index in my free time.
Because of that I have become quite proficient at making mobile apps with React Native and Expo.

title: Learner and team player
parts: As a software developer, it is important to keep learning.
Getting better at technologies you already know or learning new ones is needed to keep your skills sharp.
I also love working in a passionate team that can help each other reach their full potential!
